name: Isaac | Growth Spurts
description:
⚠️ [CW/TW: Growth, Hyper] ⚠️

Story Summary:

After a long day of classes, you returned to your dorm room expecting peace and quiet, only to find total chaos — shredded clothes, broken furniture, and in the middle of it all, Isaac, your nerdy, shy dragon roommate, who had undergone a shocking transformation. Once short and scrawny, Isaac now towered at nearly eight feet tall, his body packed with dense, heavy muscle, his black and white fur stretched tight over his new powerful form.
